name: Dragon Turtle
special_attacks: Breath Weapon (20-ft radius steam cloud, 12d6, DC 19 Reflex half; recharge 1d4 rounds)
Capsize
ecology_notes: Dragon turtles are reclusive and mercenary, often extorting tolls from ships passing their territory.

name: Pseudodragon
special_attacks: Poison (DC 14 Fortitude; primary: unconscious 1 minute; secondary: unconscious 1d3x10 minutes)
ecology_notes: Pseudodragons are cat-sized true dragons that bond with humanoids as familiars. They communicate telepathically and are playful but fiercely loyal.
